courses.title: Python Programming
courses.description: Learn Python from basics to advanced.
courses.content: This course introduces Python programming for beginners. You will learn variables, loops, functions, data structures, and file handling. By the end of the course, you will be able to build simple applications and understand how Python is used in real-world software development.

courses.title: C Programming
courses.description: Master C programming fundamentals.
courses.content: This course covers the fundamentals of C programming including data types, control structures, arrays, pointers, and functions. It helps students understand how low-level programming works and builds a strong foundation for learning advanced programming languages.

courses.title: Java Programming
courses.description: Build applications using Java.
courses.content: In this course you will learn object-oriented programming concepts using Java such as classes, objects, inheritance, polymorphism, and exception handling. Students will also develop small applications to understand Java programming in practice.

courses.title: React JS
courses.description: Learn modern React development.
courses.content: This course teaches how to build modern web applications using React. You will learn components, props, state management, hooks, routing, and API integration. By the end of the course, you will build a complete React project.

courses.title: Data Structures in C
courses.description: Understand data structures using C.
courses.content: This course focuses on fundamental data structures like arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, and graphs. Students will implement these structures using the C programming language and understand how they are used in real applications.

courses.title: Machine Learning with Python
courses.description: Introduction to machine learning.
courses.content: This course introduces the fundamentals of machine learning using Python. You will learn about supervised and unsupervised learning, regression, classification, and model evaluation. Practical examples using libraries like NumPy, Pandas, and Scikit-learn will help you understand how machine learning is used in real-world applications.

courses.title: HTML & CSS for Beginners
courses.description: Learn to build beautiful websites using HTML and CSS.
courses.content: In this course you will learn how to create web pages using HTML and style them using CSS. Topics include semantic HTML tags, layouts, colors, fonts, and responsive design. By the end of this course, you will be able to design and build modern web pages.

courses.title: JavaScript Essentials
courses.description: Master the fundamentals of JavaScript.
courses.content: This course covers the core concepts of JavaScript including variables, functions, arrays, objects, loops, and DOM manipulation. You will also learn how JavaScript interacts with HTML and CSS to create interactive web applications.

courses.title: Full Stack Web Development
courses.description: Build complete web applications using modern tools.
courses.content: This course teaches both frontend and backend development. You will work with technologies like HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, and databases to build full-stack applications from scratch.

courses.title: Node.js Backend Development
courses.description: Develop scalable backend applications using Node.js.
courses.content: Learn how to build backend applications using Node.js and Express. This course covers REST APIs, middleware, authentication, and database integration to build scalable backend systems.

courses.title: MongoDB Database Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn how to manage databases using MongoDB.
courses.content: This course explains how NoSQL databases work using MongoDB. Topics include collections, documents, CRUD operations, indexing, and integrating MongoDB with backend applications.

courses.title: SQL for Data Analysis
courses.description: Analyze data efficiently using SQL.
courses.content: In this course you will learn SQL queries, joins, aggregations, filtering, and data analysis techniques. SQL is an essential tool for analyzing large datasets and extracting insights.

courses.title: Android App Development
courses.description: Build Android apps using Java and Android Studio.
courses.content: This course teaches how to develop Android mobile applications using Java and Android Studio. You will learn layouts, activities, intents, and how to create interactive mobile apps.

courses.title: Kotlin for Android Developers
courses.description: Learn Kotlin programming for Android development.
courses.content: Kotlin is the modern language for Android development. This course covers Kotlin syntax, classes, functions, and building Android applications using Kotlin.

courses.title: Artificial Intelligence Basics
courses.description: Understand the core concepts of Artificial Intelligence.
courses.content: This course introduces artificial intelligence concepts such as intelligent agents, search algorithms, machine learning basics, and AI applications in industries.

courses.title: Deep Learning Fundamentals
courses.description: Explore neural networks and deep learning models.
courses.content: This course explains neural networks, deep learning models, and frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch. You will learn how deep learning is used in computer vision and natural language processing.

courses.title: Cyber Security Basics
courses.description: Learn how to secure systems and networks.
courses.content: This course introduces cybersecurity principles including encryption, authentication, network security, and common cyber threats.

courses.title: Cloud Computing with AWS
courses.description: Understand cloud services using AWS.
courses.content: This course teaches Git version control, repositories, commits, branches, and collaboration using GitHub.

courses.title: Git & GitHub for Developers
courses.description: Version control and collaboration using Git and GitHub.
courses.content: This course teaches Git version control, repositories, commits, branches, and collaboration using GitHub.

courses.title: Data Science with Python
courses.description: Learn data analysis, visualization, and machine learning.
courses.content: This course covers data science concepts including data analysis, visualization, statistical modeling, and machine learning using Python libraries like Pandas, Matplotlib, and Scikit-learn.
